codes.symptoms: The airflow sensor is sending bad data to the engine computer.
codes.common_causes: Dirty/failed MAF sensor, air leak, wiring fault
codes.typical_fixes: Clean or replace MAF sensor; inspect intake for leaks; check wiring

codes.symptoms: Air mass reading is out of expected range — engine may run rough.
codes.common_causes: Dirty MAF sensor, clogged air filter, boost leak
codes.typical_fixes: Clean MAF sensor; replace air filter; inspect for boost/intake leaks

codes.description: Mass Air Flow Circuit Low Input
codes.symptoms: MAF sensor signal too low — engine running rich or hesitating.
codes.common_causes: Damaged MAF, air leak upstream, wiring short to ground
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect MAF wiring for shorts; check connector; replace MAF if needed

codes.description: Mass Air Flow Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: MAF sensor signal too high — potential overfueling.
codes.common_causes: Failed MAF sensor, wiring short to power
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect wiring for short to power; replace MAF sensor

codes.symptoms: The engine can't read intake air temperature correctly.
codes.common_causes: Failed IAT sensor, wiring issue
codes.typical_fixes: Check IAT sensor resistance; inspect wiring and connector

codes.description: Intake Air Temperature Circuit High Input
codes.symptoms: IAT sensor reading extremely high — often wiring issue.
codes.common_causes: Sensor open circuit, wiring fault
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect sensor wiring for open circuit; replace IAT sensor

codes.symptoms: Throttle position sensor malfunction. Engine may not accelerate correctly.
codes.common_causes: Failed TPS, wiring fault, throttle body issue
codes.typical_fixes: Run throttle body relearn; inspect TPS wiring; replace TPS if needed

codes.symptoms: TPS reading inconsistent. Throttle relearn may resolve this.
codes.common_causes: TPS misalignment, dirty throttle body, failed TPS
codes.typical_fixes: Clean throttle body; run THROTTLE_RELEARN procedure; replace TPS if persists

codes.symptoms: TPS voltage too low. Throttle response may be sluggish.
codes.common_causes: Short to ground, failed sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Check TPS wiring for short to ground; replace sensor

codes.symptoms: TPS voltage too high. May cause rough idle or stall.
codes.common_causes: Short to power, failed sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Check TPS wiring for short to power; replace sensor

codes.symptoms: Front oxygen sensor not responding correctly. Fuel economy may suffer.
codes.common_causes: Failed O2 sensor, exhaust leak, wiring fault
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect for exhaust leaks before sensor; test sensor heater; replace O2 sensor

codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
codes.symptoms: Front O2 sensor responding too slowly — likely worn out.
codes.common_causes: Aged O2 sensor, contamination from coolant leak or oil burn
codes.typical_fixes: Replace upstream O2 sensor; check for coolant or oil consumption

codes.symptoms: O2 sensor heater not working — takes longer to warm up, affects cold start emissions.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor heater, blown fuse, wiring
codes.typical_fixes: Check O2 heater fuse; test heater resistance; replace sensor if heater open

codes.symptoms: Rear O2 sensor malfunction. Catalyst efficiency monitoring affected.
codes.common_causes: Failed O2 sensor, exhaust leak
codes.typical_fixes: Replace downstream O2 sensor; inspect for exhaust leaks

codes.symptoms: Rear O2 heater not working.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor, wiring, fuse
codes.typical_fixes: Check fuse; test heater circuit; replace downstream O2 sensor

codes.symptoms: Bank 2 front O2 sensor malfunction.
codes.common_causes: Failed O2 sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Replace Bank 2 upstream O2 sensor; check wiring

codes.symptoms: Bank 2 O2 heater circuit fault.
codes.common_causes: Wiring, failed sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Test Bank 2 O2 heater circuit; replace sensor if failed

codes.symptoms: Engine is running lean — not enough fuel for the air coming in. Check for vacuum leaks first.
codes.common_causes: Vacuum leak, dirty fuel injectors, weak fuel pump, faulty MAF
codes.typical_fixes: Smoke test for vacuum leaks; clean injectors; check fuel pressure; clean/replace MAF

codes.symptoms: Engine is running rich — too much fuel. May smell like fuel, poor economy.
codes.common_causes: Stuck-open injector, high fuel pressure, failed O2 sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Check fuel pressure; inspect injectors; replace upstream O2 if faulty

codes.symptoms: Bank 2 running lean. Same as P0171 but on the other side of V6/V8 engine.
codes.common_causes: Vacuum leak near Bank 2, dirty injectors
codes.typical_fixes: Smoke test Bank 2 area; clean injectors; check MAF

codes.symptoms: Bank 2 running rich.
codes.common_causes: Injector issue, fuel pressure
codes.typical_fixes: Check fuel pressure; inspect Bank 2 injectors

codes.symptoms: Engine is misfiring on multiple cylinders. Rough idle, possible hesitation.
codes.common_causes: Worn spark plugs, faulty ignition coils, low compression, vacuum leak
codes.typical_fixes: Replace spark plugs; test and replace ignition coils; compression test; check for vacuum leaks

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 1 misfiring. Rough idle or vibration.
codes.common_causes: Spark plug, ignition coil, injector, low compression on cyl 1
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil to another cylinder to isolate; replace plug; check compression

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 2 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 2
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 2

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 3 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 3
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 3

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 4 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 4
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 4

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 5 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 5
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 5

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 6 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 6
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 6

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 7 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 7
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 7

codes.symptoms: Cylinder 8 misfiring.
codes.common_causes: Plug, coil, injector on cyl 8
codes.typical_fixes: Swap coil; replace plug; check compression on cylinder 8

codes.symptoms: Crankshaft position sensor malfunction. Engine may crank but not start.
codes.common_causes: Failed CKP sensor, damaged reluctor ring, wiring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace CKP sensor; inspect reluctor ring for damage; check wiring

codes.symptoms: Cam sensor fault. Engine may run rough or not start.
codes.common_causes: Failed cam sensor, timing chain stretch, wiring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace cam sensor; check timing chain stretch; inspect wiring

codes.symptoms: Catalytic converter is worn out and not cleaning exhaust properly.
codes.common_causes: Failed catalytic converter, O2 sensor fault, exhaust leak before cat
codes.typical_fixes: Verify with oscilloscope on rear O2; replace catalytic converter; check for exhaust leaks

codes.symptoms: Bank 2 catalytic converter degraded.
codes.common_causes: Failed cat, O2 sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Replace Bank 2 catalytic converter; verify rear O2 sensor function

codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Incorrect Purge Flow
codes.symptoms: EVAP purge system malfunction. No drivability impact. Gas smell possible.
codes.common_causes: Failed purge valve, loose gas cap, EVAP hose leak
codes.typical_fixes: Test purge valve; inspect EVAP hoses; check gas cap seal

codes.symptoms: EVAP vent valve stuck. Fuel cap area smell possible.
codes.common_causes: Stuck vent valve, canister clog
codes.typical_fixes: Test vent valve solenoid; inspect charcoal canister

codes.symptoms: Large fuel vapor leak detected. Check gas cap first — often the cause.
codes.common_causes: Missing/loose gas cap, cracked EVAP hose, failed purge valve
codes.typical_fixes: Tighten gas cap; smoke test EVAP system; replace purge valve if needed

codes.symptoms: Small EVAP leak. Usually gas cap not fully tightened.
codes.common_causes: Loose gas cap, micro-crack in EVAP line
codes.typical_fixes: Tighten/replace gas cap; smoke test for small EVAP leaks

codes.symptoms: Vehicle speed sensor not reading correctly. Speedometer may be erratic.
codes.common_causes: Failed VSS, wiring fault, ABS reluctor ring damage
codes.typical_fixes: Check ABS speed sensor outputs; inspect reluctor ring; replace VSS

codes.symptoms: Idle speed control problem. Engine may idle rough or stall at stops.
codes.common_causes: Dirty throttle body, failed IAC, vacuum leak
codes.typical_fixes: Clean throttle body; run THROTTLE_RELEARN procedure; inspect for vacuum leaks

codes.symptoms: Engine computer internal failure. Usually requires ECU replacement.
codes.common_causes: Failed ECU, firmware corruption, power surge damage
codes.typical_fixes: Verify power and ground to ECU; replace ECU if confirmed; re-flash if possible

codes.symptoms: Transmission computer detected a fault. Check for additional TCM codes.
codes.common_causes: See companion codes for specific fault
codes.typical_fixes: Read all TCM codes for specifics; check fluid level and condition

codes.symptoms: Transmission input speed sensor fault. Shift quality may be affected.
codes.common_causes: Failed speed sensor, wiring, solenoid body
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect sensor wiring; replace input speed sensor; check solenoid body

codes.symptoms: Transmission output speed sensor fault.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor, wiring, reluctor ring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace output speed sensor; inspect reluctor ring

codes.symptoms: Transmission slipping — not achieving expected gear ratio. May slip under load.
codes.common_causes: Low fluid, worn clutch packs, failed solenoid, fluid contamination
codes.typical_fixes: Check fluid level/condition; service transmission; test solenoids

codes.description: Torque Converter Clutch Solenoid Stuck Off
codes.symptoms: Torque converter lockup not engaging. Reduced fuel economy, may shudder.
codes.common_causes: Failed TCC solenoid, fluid contamination, low fluid level
codes.typical_fixes: Service transmission fluid; replace TCC solenoid; check for contamination

codes.symptoms: Transmission shift solenoid A faulty. Shifts may be harsh or skipped.
codes.common_causes: Failed solenoid, dirty fluid, wiring
codes.typical_fixes: Change transmission fluid; replace shift solenoid A; check wiring

codes.description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Right front ABS wheel speed sensor bad. ABS warning light on.
codes.common_causes: Failed wheel speed sensor, damaged tone ring, wiring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace right front wheel speed sensor; inspect tone ring for damage

codes.description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Intermittent
codes.symptoms: Right front speed sensor signal dropping out intermittently.
codes.common_causes: Damaged sensor wire, loose connector, corroded tone ring
codes.typical_fixes: Flex wiring harness to find intermittent; clean connector; replace sensor

codes.description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Right rear ABS speed sensor bad.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor, tone ring, wiring damage
codes.typical_fixes: Replace right rear wheel speed sensor; inspect tone ring

codes.description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Left front ABS speed sensor bad.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor, tone ring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace left front wheel speed sensor; inspect tone ring

codes.description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Malfunction
codes.symptoms: Left rear ABS speed sensor bad.
codes.common_causes: Failed sensor, tone ring
codes.typical_fixes: Replace left rear wheel speed sensor; inspect tone ring

codes.symptoms: ABS ECU detected an engine system fault. Usually paired with engine codes.
codes.common_causes: Related to engine DTC — fix engine codes first
codes.typical_fixes: Read and resolve engine DTCs first; recheck ABS system

codes.symptoms: ABS hydraulic modulator relay fault. ABS inoperative.
codes.common_causes: Failed ABS modulator relay, wiring, failed ABS actuator
codes.typical_fixes: Test ABS relay; replace ABS actuator assembly if relay tests good

codes.symptoms: KDSS pressure sensor reading out of range. System may be in fail-safe.
codes.common_causes: Failed pressure sensor, air in circuit, low fluid
codes.typical_fixes: Run KDSS_NEUTRALIZE procedure; check fluid level; replace pressure sensor if needed

codes.symptoms: KDSS hydraulic pump fault. System cannot maintain pressure.
codes.common_causes: Failed pump motor, low fluid, electrical fault
codes.typical_fixes: Check fluid level; test pump motor circuit; run KDSS_NEUTRALIZE; replace pump if failed

codes.symptoms: KDSS accumulator pressure below minimum. Air likely in hydraulic circuit.
codes.common_causes: Air in circuit after service, accumulator failure
codes.typical_fixes: Run KDSS_NEUTRALIZE procedure to purge air; inspect accumulator

codes.symptoms: One or more KDSS solenoid valves not responding correctly.
codes.common_causes: Failed solenoid valve, wiring fault, low fluid
codes.typical_fixes: Run KDSS_NEUTRALIZE; test individual valve solenoids; check fluid level

codes.symptoms: KDSS hydraulic fluid level below minimum. Top up and run neutralization.
codes.common_causes: Fluid leak, recent service without proper fill
codes.typical_fixes: Top up KDSS fluid; inspect for leaks; run KDSS_NEUTRALIZE procedure

codes.symptoms: TPMS receiver module not working correctly.
codes.common_causes: Failed TPMS module, antenna issue
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect TPMS antenna connector; replace TPMS receiver module

codes.symptoms: One or more TPMS sensors not programmed to this vehicle. Common after tire rotation or new sensors.
codes.common_causes: Sensor IDs not registered after service
codes.typical_fixes: Run TPMS_PROGRAM procedure to register all sensor IDs

codes.symptoms: One TPMS sensor has low battery. Sensor will need replacement.
codes.common_causes: Aged sensor battery (5–10 year life)
codes.typical_fixes: Replace affected TPMS sensor; re-register with TPMS_PROGRAM procedure

codes.symptoms: One or more tires below minimum pressure. Check and inflate tires.
codes.common_causes: Underinflated tire, puncture, temperature drop
codes.typical_fixes: Inflate all tires to spec; inspect for puncture or slow leak

codes.symptoms: Front left TPMS sensor not transmitting. Check sensor and register.
codes.common_causes: Dead sensor battery, sensor damage
codes.typical_fixes: Replace front left TPMS sensor; run TPMS_PROGRAM procedure

codes.symptoms: Front right TPMS sensor not transmitting.
codes.common_causes: Dead sensor battery, sensor damage
codes.typical_fixes: Replace front right TPMS sensor; run TPMS_PROGRAM procedure

codes.symptoms: Rear left TPMS sensor not transmitting.
codes.common_causes: Dead sensor battery, sensor damage
codes.typical_fixes: Replace rear left TPMS sensor; run TPMS_PROGRAM procedure

codes.symptoms: Rear right TPMS sensor not transmitting.
codes.common_causes: Dead sensor battery, sensor damage
codes.typical_fixes: Replace rear right TPMS sensor; run TPMS_PROGRAM procedure

codes.description: Steering Angle Sensor Zero Point Unset
codes.symptoms: Steering angle sensor needs calibration. VSC system limited.
codes.common_causes: Sensor replaced, battery disconnect, wheel alignment done
codes.typical_fixes: Run SAS_RESET procedure to set zero-point calibration

codes.symptoms: Steering angle sensor not communicating on CAN bus.
codes.common_causes: Failed SAS, wiring, CAN bus fault
codes.typical_fixes: Check CAN bus wiring to SAS; replace steering angle sensor

codes.symptoms: Steering angle sensor reading out of expected range after calibration attempt.
codes.common_causes: Sensor misalignment, mechanical issue, failed sensor
codes.typical_fixes: Center steering wheel precisely; re-run SAS_RESET; replace sensor if persists

codes.symptoms: SAS requires zero-point calibration. Usually set after alignment.
codes.common_causes: Alignment performed, sensor replaced, battery reset
codes.typical_fixes: Run SAS_RESET procedure; clear DTC after calibration

codes.symptoms: Vehicle stability sensor (yaw rate/lateral G) fault. VSC may be disabled.
codes.common_causes: Failed yaw sensor, sensor needs initialization
codes.typical_fixes: Run SAS_RESET procedure; replace yaw rate sensor if calibration fails

codes.symptoms: Climate control module fault. A/C may not work correctly.
codes.common_causes: Failed HVAC module, blend door actuator, refrigerant issue
codes.typical_fixes: Check blend door actuators; verify refrigerant charge; replace HVAC module

codes.symptoms: Door open switch reading incorrectly. Dome light or entry system affected.
codes.common_causes: Faulty door switch, wiring, latching mechanism
codes.typical_fixes: Test door switch continuity; inspect door latch mechanism; replace switch

codes.symptoms: Driver airbag circuit has an open. Airbag may not deploy in crash.
codes.common_causes: Wiring fault, failed squib, connector issue
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect clock spring; check squib connector; replace airbag module

codes.symptoms: Driver airbag squib resistance out of range. Safety system compromised.
codes.common_causes: Corroded connector, partial wire break, wrong squib
codes.typical_fixes: Clean squib connector; inspect wiring for partial breaks; verify correct squib resistance

codes.symptoms: Passenger airbag circuit fault. Airbag deployment unreliable.
codes.common_causes: Wiring, squib, connector
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect passenger airbag connector; check squib resistance; replace if out of spec

codes.symptoms: 4WD transfer case actuator fault. 4WD selection may not work.
codes.common_causes: Failed actuator, wiring, vacuum line (older models)
codes.typical_fixes: Test actuator motor; inspect wiring; replace 4WD actuator

codes.symptoms: 4WD Low switch circuit fault. 4LO engagement may be unreliable.
codes.common_causes: Failed switch, wiring fault
codes.typical_fixes: Test 4LO switch; inspect wiring harness near transfer case

codes.symptoms: Electric parking brake system fault. Manual release may be required.
codes.common_causes: Motor failed, stuck caliper, control module fault
codes.typical_fixes: Run EPB_SERVICE procedure; inspect caliper and motor; replace if needed

codes.symptoms: EPB motor circuit open. Parking brake may be stuck or inoperative.
codes.common_causes: Broken wire, failed EPB motor, corroded connector
codes.typical_fixes: Inspect EPB wiring harness; clean connectors; replace EPB motor if open circuit confirmed

codes.symptoms: EPB motor thermal protection triggered from repeated cycling.
codes.common_causes: Multiple actuations in short time, motor starting to fail
codes.typical_fixes: Allow motor to cool; avoid repeated EPB cycling; run EPB_SERVICE to verify operation

codes.symptoms: EPB caliper retraction needed for brake service. Normal during pad replacement.
codes.common_causes: Routine brake pad service
codes.typical_fixes: Run EPB_SERVICE OPEN mode to retract calipers; install pads; run EPB_SERVICE CLOSE mode
